landing.headline: Fix anything. Fear nothing.
landing.subheadline: Point your camera at any broken household object — get instant diagnosis, AR-guided steps, and safety-first confirmations.
landing.trustSubtitle: Safety-first repairs with clear AR guidance.
landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Download the app today and get your first 3 repairs completely free. No subscription required.
landing.footerDescription: FixAura helps everyday people diagnose, plan, and complete repairs with confidence, safety, and clarity.
landing.footerNewsletterBody: Get repair tips and AR news.

aiVisionScan.title: AI vision scan
aiVisionScan.description: Point your phone camera at any broken household object and FixAura detects the likely issue instantly.

safetyGuidance.title: Safety-first guidance
safetyGuidance.description: Critical steps are gated behind confirmation prompts so users never skip safety checks.

toolChecklists.title: Tool checklists
toolChecklists.description: Each repair generates a practical checklist so users know exactly what to gather before starting.

arStepOverlays.title: AR step overlays
arStepOverlays.description: On-screen highlights and arrows make each repair step feel guided, visual, and easy to follow.

maya.name: Maya R.
maya.quote: Fixed our dryer in one evening — saved a $200 service call.

james.name: James K.
james.quote: The AR arrows made a scary repair feel manageable.

priya.name: Priya S.
priya.quote: Confidence meter told me when to retake the photo. Smart.

preview.safetyLine: Repair is safe to continue after shutoff confirmation.
preview.arOverlayLockedLine: AR overlay locked to the leak area

capture.title: Scan the problem
capture.instruction: Align the broken part inside the frame
capture.permissionBody: Allow camera access so FixAura can scan and diagnose your repair.
capture.errorBody: We couldn't access your camera. Check permissions or try another device.
capture.unsafeLighting: Lighting looks too dim — move to a brighter area for a clearer scan.
capture.unstableMotion: Hold steady — motion detected. Pause before capturing.

tools.title: Gather your tools
tools.subtitle: Check off each item before you begin.
tools.acknowledgeEssential: Acknowledge all essential tools to continue

completion.title: Repair complete
completion.subtitle: You did it — great work staying safe and thorough.
completion.sharePrefix: I just completed a repair with FixAura — saved ~$

safety.powerOff: Turn off power at the breaker before continuing.
safety.waterShutoff: Shut off water supply before disassembly.
safety.gloves: Wear protective gloves for this step.

fallback.title: We're not fully confident
fallback.body: The image may be unclear or the issue unusual. Retake a well-lit photo, or continue with caution.
